mapper.select: select rc.id, rc.classroom_code as classroomCode, rc.classroom_name as classroomName, rc.building_id as buildingId, rb.building_code as buildingCode, rb.building_name as buildingName, rc.seat_count as seatCount, rc.room_type as roomType, rc.status, rc.remark from res_classroom rc left join res_building rb on rb.id = rc.building_id and rb.deleted = 0 where rc.deleted = 0 and rc.id = #{id} limit 1
